zh.lifeSummary: 當Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes於0930年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可南斯時，他的父親Alain de Poher Duc de Bretagne27歲，母親Judith De Blois, de Troyes la noble28歲。他和Duchess Judith de Nantes至少有2個兒子。他去世於0981年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安喬享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nantes,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Adelina, Caridad, Cesar, Corazon, Edmundo, Eduardo, Elena, Graciela, Igmedio, Luisa, Manuel, Mario.
Galician: probably a variant of   Dantas  . This surname is rare in Spain; it is found mainly in the Philippines.
French (Dantès): unexplained. This surname is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Dantas
meanings: Portuguese and Galician: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, from any of the many places called Antas in Portugal and Galicia (Spain), from the plural of anta ‘dolmen’.

nameMeanings.name: Hoel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, composed of two different Hebrew elements, Yah(weh) and El, both of which mean ‘God’ the implication of the name is that the Hebrew God, Yahweh, is the only true god. This is a common name in the Bible, being borne by, among others, one of King David's ‘mighty men’ (1 Chronicles 11:38), and a minor prophet who lived in the 8th century bc . The name has been perennially popular as a Jewish name; it was also taken up by the Puritans and other Christian fundamentalists. The name has long been in regular use in North America but was uncommon in Britain until the 1990s. Well-known bearers of the name include the American singer and entertainer Joel Grey ( b. 1932 ), the West Indian cricketer Joel Garner ( b. 1952 ), and the American film director Joel Coen ( b. 1954 ). The French form Joël is also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes was born in 0930, in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Alain de Poher Duc de Bretagne, was 27 and his mother, Judith De Blois, de Troyes la noble, was 28. He had at least 2 sons with Duchess Judith de Nantes. He died in 0981, in Anjou, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 51.

Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Duchess Judith de Nantes. Il est décédé en 0981, à Anjou, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes(이)가 0930년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 난츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alain de Poher Duc de Bretagne(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith De Blois, de Troyes la noble(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Duchess Judith de Nantes(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 0981년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤조우에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Duchess Judith de Nantes. Он умер в 0981 г. в местности анджоу, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 51 год.
